name: digital paper

releases.author: danferns
releases.description: Removes a console log command that cluttered up the developer console. ( #3 )
releases.name: Removed console.log

releases.author: danferns
releases.description:
This release fixes the following bugs:
- If the user tried to change existing text, the cursor would jump to the start of the file and remain stuck until manually placed at the end.
- The digital paper mode would not work well with auto-pairs (eg. typing `(`, results in `()`). So I'm using a workaround (replace `()` back to just `(`). Due to some side effects mentioned in #2, I've disabled pasting from the clipboard, as it may lead to confusing behavior.
releases.name: Bugfix Update

releases.author: danferns
releases.description: The ID of the "digital-paper-toggle" command is now just "toggle".
releases.name: Implement Obsidian Feedback

releases.author: danferns
releases.description: This release fixes a bug that would enable the digital paper mode every time the vault was opened, regardless of the setting in the previous session.
releases.name: Fix: preserve settings between sessions

releases.author: danferns
releases.description:
This is the initial version of the Digital Paper Obsidian Plugin. It disallows any deletion of text that's already written on a note, so you can write with the permanence of writing on paper
. 
There is a command to toggle the feature globally called `digital paper: Toggle digital paper mode`. 

**Please note that there may be bugs in this version that could lead to data loss, so it is very important that you keep backups and use this plugin only at your own risk.**
releases.name: Initial Release
